notes: Seed LUTs are generated offline with skills/media-use/scripts/lib/cube-build.mjs, not lutgen-rs. Regenerate by importing buildCube, writing the desired params at size 9 or higher, and validating with scripts/lib/cube-validate.mjs.

looks.description: Teal shadows and warm orange highlights for blockbuster-style cinematic footage.
High-contrast desaturated bleach bypass look with strong blacks.
Soft faded film wash with lifted blacks and warm highlights.
